offer: For Amazon sellers processing 10–50 invoices/month, difficulty in tracking sales commission data causes cash flow gaps. We simplify data extraction and consolidation instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in tracking and consolidating sales commission data
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Amazon sellers
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach to Amazon sellers with demo video
Community forums where Amazon sellers share tools
try_it: Let users try Weekly summary reports and Data extraction on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
